STEMmed In weekly

A newsletter breaking down how AI and machine learning show up in medicine, finance, physics, biology, chemistry, and beyond.

Live stemmedin.com
Focus
4

Physics

Simulation-aware ML, inverse problems, scientific computing, and uncertainty estimation.

Medicine

Clinical AI fundamentals: evaluation, trial logic, risk models, imaging pipelines, deployment.

Finance

Forecasting, portfolio ideas, risk controls, and methods that avoid fragile backtests.

Bio/Chem

Sequence + structure representations, noisy data, and modeling foundations.
